title: The Throne of Words
storySnippet: You face the final trial at the Throne of Words, where every spelling challenge from the fortress awaits your mastery.

data.sentenceContext: The poet used onomatopoeia to bring the sounds of the battlefield to life.
A serendipitous encounter with an old friend led to a wonderful adventure.
The revolution was driven by tensions between the bourgeoisie and the working class.
Completing all sixteen levels is a tremendous accomplishment.
Advances in pharmaceutical research have saved countless lives.
Old parchments will deteriorate quickly if exposed to moisture.
Each kingdom had its own idiosyncrasy that set it apart from the others.
The heroes arranged a final rendezvous before storming the fortress gates.

exercises.prompt: Complete the sentence with the correct word.

data.sentence: The ___ scales of the fish sparkled in shades of blue and green.

exercises.prompt: Complete the sentence with the correct word.

data.sentence: The new law will ___ the outdated regulation from last century.
data.hint: To take the place of; to replace

exercises.prompt: Complete the sentence with the correct word.

data.sentence: The spy made a ___ escape through the back door without anyone noticing.
data.hint: Done in a secret or sneaky way

exercises.prompt: Complete the sentence with the correct word.

data.sentence: The story had such ___ that the audience forgot it was fiction.
data.hint: The quality of appearing to be true or real
